nasb.text: So have those become to you with whom you have labored, Who have trafficked with you from your youth; Each has wandered in his own way; There is none to save you.

esv.text: Such to you are those with whom you have labored, who have done business with you from your youth; they wander about, each in his own direction; there is no one to save you.

cnv.text: 你所勞碌的事，都要這樣與你無益； 從你年幼時與你交易的， 也都必各奔各方，四處飄流， 沒有人拯救你。”

ccb.text: 你自幼交往的占星家帮不上你， 他们都四散奔逃，无人救你。

csbs.text: 那些与你一起辛劳的， 就是从你年轻时就与你一起做买卖的， 对你也是如此； 他们各奔己路，四处飘流， 没有人拯救你。”
